query:
INSERT INTO cities (name, countryId, isActive) VALUES
-- Qatar
('Doha', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'QA'), 1),
('Al Wakrah', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'QA'), 1),
('Al Khor', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'QA'), 1),
('Lusail', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'QA'), 1),
-- Kuwait
('Kuwait City', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'KW'), 1),
('Hawalli', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'KW'), 1),
('Salmiya', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'KW'), 1),
('Jahra', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'KW'), 1),
('Ahmadi', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'KW'), 1),
-- Bahrain
('Manama', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'BH'), 1),
('Riffa', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'BH'), 1),
('Muharraq', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'BH'), 1),
('Hamad Town', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'BH'), 1),
-- Oman
('Muscat', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'OM'), 1),
('Salalah', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'OM'), 1),
('Sohar', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'OM'), 1),
('Nizwa', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'OM'), 1),
('Sur', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'OM'), 1)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name=VALUES(name);
